action_repr: SPEAK: I’m not ready to vote Orange off yet. I had an alibi for ~T15 — I was toggling between Upper Engine and Reactor (I moved UE→Reactor at T15) and didn’t see any venting or P4 in Security/Medbay. P4 and P5 were seen entering Reactor at T13, so we need clarification on their movements between T13–T15. Player 1, how exactly did you see the venting (camera or direct)? Player 6 (Security), were you watching cams? I suggest we check Security cams right after this meeting or send 1–2 people (I can go to Upper Engine) to cover the Reactor↔Upper Engine corridor before making a vote.

I’m happy to stick with someone or go check Upper Engine with a buddy so no one goes alone. Can we confirm cams/evidence before voting?
